# SOCIAL PROOF AUTOMATION (Totally Customized Templates)

## One Review. Three Platforms. Zero Effort.

### Instagram
- STORY
- ★★★★★
- "Amazing service! Highly recommended."
- — Sarah M.
- YourBrand.com

### Facebook
- POST (not a story)
- ★★★★★
- "Amazing service! Highly recommended."
- — Sarah M.
- Stays on timeline permanently — not 24hr like Stories

### LinkedIn
- POST (not a story)
- ★★★★★
- "Amazing service! Highly recommended."
- — Sarah M.
- Reaches 628 audience & builds professional credibility

## All three formats generated from the same review automatically — fully branded, zero manual design work.
